summary: Results-driven executive with 15+ years leading manufacturing and operations teams. Proven record of improving throughput, reducing cost, and scaling production safely while aligning cross-functional stakeholders. Known for data-backed decisions, lean implementation, and building high-trust teams.

experience.title: Vice President, Manufacturing
bullets: Led 400+ FTE organization across three plants; improved OEE by 18% in 24 months.
Deployed predictive maintenance program reducing unplanned downtime by 28%.
Partnered with Product and Supply Chain on NPI, cutting launch cycle time by 22%.

experience.title: Director of Operations
bullets: Standardized work instructions and layered audits; recordable incident rate down 35%.
Negotiated CAPEX roadmap of $42M with ROI payback under 3 years average.

projectsDetailed.title: Cross-Campus Orientation Portal
detailLines: Description: Unified onboarding site for 4 colleges with shared SSO and resource library.

Technologies used: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Canvas API.
Outcome: Cut orientation check-in time by 35% and raised survey satisfaction scores.

Outcome: Rolled out to 120+ instructors; adoption tracked via usage dashboards.
